title: Positive flow: User navigates to the login screen
test_steps: Open the Lynda.com app. | Navigate to the onboarding screen. | Click on the 'Already a member?' button.
expected_result: The user is redirected to the login screen.

title: Negative flow: User clicks on 'Start your free trial' button
test_steps: Open the Lynda.com app. | Navigate to the onboarding screen. | Click on the 'Start your free trial' button.
expected_result: The user is redirected to the free trial sign-up screen.

title: UI test: Verify the 'Already a member?' button is clickable
test_steps: Open the Lynda.com app. | Navigate to the onboarding screen. | Click on the 'Already a member?' button.
expected_result: The 'Already a member?' button is responsive and navigates to the login screen.

title: Accessibility test: Ensure the 'Already a member?' button is accessible

expected_result: The 'Already a member?' button is announced correctly by the screen reader.
